assignments.name: text_input
assignments.value: =Additional Input Content ( with file input given or without file input also ) : {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.text }}

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert Instructional Designer and Content Structuring AI.

Your task is to convert SOP or document content into a high-quality structured JSON output.

STRICT RULES:
1. Output ONLY valid JSON (no text, no explanation, no markdown).
2. Follow the exact JSON schema provided in the user prompt.
3. Do NOT add extra keys or remove required keys.
4. Ensure the JSON is properly formatted and parsable.

CONTENT RULES:
- Extract meaningful and complete information from the input
- Cover ALL important points in the summary (no loss of key info)
- Keep content clear, structured, and easy to understand
- Remove noise, irrelevant metadata, and formatting artifacts

QUALITY REQUIREMENTS:
- Summary must be comprehensive yet concise
- Training steps must be logically ordered and actionable
- Quiz questions must be relevant and test understanding of the content
- Avoid repetition and vague statements

If the output is not valid JSON, regenerate internally before responding.

parameters.content:
# AI Agent Part

1. Takes Input PDF/Text
2. Use Gemini to generate JSON output for summary training contnent and quiz

headers.user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

summary.title: HBL Purchase Standard Operating Procedure (Rev 8)
key_points: The SOP governs the entire procurement lifecycle from indenting to final payment for all domestic and import purchases.
Procurement is guided by principles of legality, accountability, ethics, social responsibility, and transparency.
All purchase activities begin with a Purchase Requisition (PR) raised in SAP, approved through a defined release strategy.
External Providers (vendors) must undergo a formal evaluation by Purchase and QA teams before being added to the Approved External Provider List.
A minimum of three quotes is preferred for Request for Quotation (RFQ) processes to ensure competitive landed cost comparisons.
Purchase Orders (PO) are issued based on a delegation of authority ranging from PPC Head (<50k INR) to SCM Head (>1Cr INR).
Quality Control (QC) performs inward inspection; material acceptance is required before generating a Goods Receipt Note (GRN).
Production Part Approval Process (PPAP) Level 2 is mandatory for new parts or significant changes in vendor processes/locations.
The Avinya Vendor Portal is the primary platform for RFQs, quotation comparisons, and order processing.
Specific controls are in place for import samples, which should ideally be on a Delivered Duty Paid (DDP) basis.

steps.title: Requisition Initiation
steps.description: User departments or PPC identify requirements and raise an online Purchase Requisition (PR) in SAP. Ensure all specifications, drawing numbers, and budget approvals (AON for capital items) are attached.

steps.title: Vendor Selection & RFQ
steps.description: Select vendors from the Approved External Provider List. If a new vendor is needed, initiate the registration and evaluation process. Float RFQs to at least three providers via the Avinya portal.

steps.title: Quotation Comparison & Negotiation
steps.description: Review the automated comparative statement in Avinya. Analyze landed costs, payment terms, and lead times. Conduct negotiations to finalize technical and commercial terms.

steps.title: Purchase Order (PO) Release
steps.description: Generate the PO in the system. It must be approved according to the value-based release strategy before being sent to the vendor along with the latest drawings or specifications.

steps.title: Expediting & Logistics
steps.description: Follow up with the vendor to ensure adherence to the delivery schedule. Coordinate transportation via empaneled logistics providers or internal arrangements as per the agreed Incoterms.

steps.title: Inward Inspection & Receipt
steps.description: Upon arrival, generate a gate entry. Quality Control (QC) inspects the material against the inspection plan. If accepted, Stores generate the Goods Receipt Note (GRN) and update stock.

steps.title: Invoice Verification & Payment
steps.description: Submit the original invoice, MIGO (Goods Movement), and duty credit documents to Finance. Finance performs Invoice Verification (MIRO) and processes payment per PO terms.

questions.question: What is the minimum number of quotes preferably required when floating an RFQ for BOM items?
questions.explanation: According to the SOP, for standard BOM items, RFQs are floated and preferably 3 quotes are collected to ensure a fair comparison.

questions.question: Which process must be initiated if a supplier changes their production location or critical raw materials?
questions.explanation: PPAP Level 2 is required for any new part submission or for approval of any significant change to an existing part or process, such as location or material changes.

questions.question: What is the required score for an external provider to be 'Approved for Enlistment' during evaluation?
questions.explanation: The SOP criteria states that a score of 75% and above is required for an external provider to be approved for enlistment.

questions.question: Who has the authority to approve a Purchase Order (PO) with a value exceeding 10,000,001 INR?
questions.explanation: The approval strategy table identifies the SCM Head as the approver for values greater than 10,000,001 INR.

questions.question: In the case of rejected materials at the inward stage, who is responsible for obtaining compliance from the provider for the SCAR (Supplier Corrective Action Request)?
questions.explanation: While QC generates the SCAR, the SOP explicitly states it is the responsibility of the Purchase Department to obtain compliance from the External Provider for its closure.
